title: pedicularis roylei subsp. roylei
intro: Pedicularis roylei subsp. roylei, also known as Himalayan lousewort, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, Pedicularis roylei subsp. roylei is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in the form of tinctures or extracts for its medicinal properties.
